en: Should I not have done that?
I tell ya, I gotta plead ignorance on this thing
because if anyone had said anything to me at all when I first started here
ko: 내가 여기 처음 시작했을 때 누군가가 그런 걸 하면 안 된다고 말해줬다면,

en: that that sort of thing was frowned upon.
You know, cause I've worked in a lot of offices
and I tell ya, people do that all the time.
